aboutUs_footer: Every drop of blood makes a difference. Join us in our mission to provide a better life for all and ensure that blood reaches those in need at every moment.
footer_copyright: © 2026 Qatrah Hayat. Developed with love for humanity.
HERO_SUBTITLE: One donation can save multiple lives. Be the reason someone gets a second chance today.
aboutUs_subtitle: is an integrated digital platform aimed at restructuring the blood donation and request ecosystem by connecting donors and recipients with blood bank branches within a smart and secure environment. The system provides structured mechanisms for campaign management and request tracking, ensuring rapid response to emergencies, reducing waste, and enhancing healthcare service reliability. Through Qatrah Hayat, we strive to leverage technology to build an effective communication network that contributes to saving lives and promoting a culture of community donation.
USER_FEATURE_1_DESC: Select the blood type and quantity and submit your request within minutes.
USER_FEATURE_2_DESC: Follow updates clearly from pending to completed.
USER_FEATURE_3_DESC: Prevents donation before the approved time interval has passed.
USER_FEATURE_4_DESC: Receive alerts when your blood type is urgently needed near your location.
HIW_DESC: Start within minutes and help save a life.
HIW_2_DESC: Enter your blood type and important details.
HIW_3_DESC: Choose what you need and submit your request.
NEED_DESC: Contribute by donating the most needed blood types.
NEED_NOTE: These indicators are illustrative until full integration.
CAMPAIGNS_SUBTITLE: Explore available campaigns and help save lives.
CAMPAIGN_1_DESC: A blood donation campaign held on campus to support inventory and meet urgent needs.
LOC_DESC: Find Jordan Blood Bank branches and partner hospitals.
MAP_NOTE: The interactive map will be available soon.
LOC_NOTE: Select a location to view details.
FAQ_DESC: Brief answers to the most common questions.
FAQ_Q1: Who is eligible to donate blood?
FAQ_A1: Eligibility depends on age, health condition, and the approved donation interval.
FAQ_A2: The system prevents donation before the approved time interval has passed.
FAQ_Q3: How do I create a blood request?
FAQ_A3: You can specify the blood type and required quantity, then track the request status.
FAQ_A4: You will receive alerts when your blood type is urgently needed.
FINAL_TITLE: Be the Reason to Save a Life
FINAL_DESC: Create your account now and start donating or requesting blood through Qatrah Hayat.
LOGIN_PAGE_SUBTITLE: Log in and make a difference today.
PRIVACY_DESC: This policy explains what data we collect, how we use it, and the choices you have when using Qatrah Hayat.
PRIVACY_OVERVIEW_P1: Qatrah Hayat connects blood donors and people in need with blood bank branches through an organized workflow.
PRIVACY_OVERVIEW_P2: We collect only the data needed to operate the platform and provide a safer, clearer experience.
PRIVACY_DATA_1: Account information: name, email, and login credentials (passwords are stored securely).
PRIVACY_DATA_2: Blood-related info: blood type and donation/request history (as applicable).
PRIVACY_DATA_3: Request details: blood type, units needed, and request status.
PRIVACY_DATA_4: Technical data: basic logs for troubleshooting and security.
PRIVACY_NO_LOCATION_DESC: We do not request or store your device location.
PRIVACY_USE_1: To create accounts and enable secure login.
PRIVACY_USE_2: To manage blood requests and donation records.
PRIVACY_USE_3: To provide tracking and status updates for requests.
PRIVACY_USE_4: To improve platform performance and prevent abuse.
PRIVACY_EMAIL_P1: We may send email notifications related to account security and important updates.
PRIVACY_EMAIL_P2: You can manage notification preferences where available.
PRIVACY_SHARING_1: Data may be accessed by authorized blood bank branch staff for processing requests and donations.
PRIVACY_SHARING_2: Administrative users (e.g., Ministry dashboard) may view aggregated reports and operational data based on permissions.
PRIVACY_SHARING_3: Service providers (hosting/email delivery) may process limited data to operate the platform.
PRIVACY_NO_SELL: We do not sell your personal data.
PRIVACY_SECURITY_2: Secure storage and limited access to sensitive data.
PRIVACY_SECURITY_3: Password protection and standard security practices.
PRIVACY_RETENTION_1: We retain account data while your account is active and as needed to operate the platform.
PRIVACY_RETENTION_2: We may retain certain records for a reasonable period for auditing and operational needs.
PRIVACY_RIGHTS_1: Access and update your profile information.
PRIVACY_RIGHTS_2: Request a copy of your data where applicable.
PRIVACY_DELETE_ACCOUNT: You can request to delete your account.
PRIVACY_CHILDREN_P1: The platform is not intended for children without appropriate eligibility and consent requirements.
PRIVACY_CHANGES_P1: We may update this policy from time to time. We will publish the latest version on this page.
PRIVACY_CONTACT_P1: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy, contact us through the support channels.
TERMS_DESC: These terms govern your use of Qatrah Hayat. Please read them carefully before using the platform.
TERMS_OVERVIEW_P1: Qatrah Hayat provides tools to manage blood donation and blood requests through organized workflows.
TERMS_OVERVIEW_P2: By using the platform, you agree to these Terms and any related policies.
TERMS_ACCEPT_P1: By accessing or using Qatrah Hayat, you agree to comply with these Terms. If you do not agree, please do not use the platform.
TERMS_ELIG_1: You must provide accurate information when creating an account.
TERMS_ELIG_2: Donation eligibility depends on approved medical rules and time intervals.
TERMS_ELIG_3: Certain services may require verification by authorized staff.
TERMS_ACC_1: You are responsible for protecting your login credentials.
TERMS_ACC_2: You must keep your profile information up to date.
TERMS_ACC_3: We may suspend accounts involved in misuse or fraudulent activity.
TERMS_REQ_1: Requests must be submitted with accurate blood type and required units.
TERMS_REQ_2: The platform does not guarantee availability of blood units.
TERMS_REQ_3: Authorized staff may validate, update, or close requests based on operational needs.
TERMS_NOTIF_P1: We may send email notifications related to account security, request updates, or important service notices.
TERMS_RESP_1: Use the platform respectfully and provide truthful information.
TERMS_RESP_2: Do not impersonate others or submit misleading requests.
TERMS_RESP_3: Follow guidance and instructions provided by authorized staff.
TERMS_PROH_1: Attempting to breach security or access data without authorization.
TERMS_PROH_2: Using the platform for illegal purposes or harassment.
TERMS_DISC_1: The platform is an information and workflow tool, not medical advice.
TERMS_DISC_2: Always consult medical professionals regarding donation suitability.
TERMS_DISC_3: We are not liable for outcomes arising from inaccurate user-submitted data.
TERMS_AVAIL_P1: We aim to keep the service available, but interruptions may occur due to maintenance or technical issues.
TERMS_CHANGES_P1: We may update these Terms from time to time. Continued use indicates acceptance of the updated Terms.
TERMS_CONTACT_P1: For questions about these Terms, contact support via the official channels.
